description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single job named test that runs in the default test stage. In the test job execute the following shell commands: docker run -d -p 80:80 -v `pwd`/www:/www fnichol/uhttpd, then sleep 1, then curl http://docker:80/. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
